name: Omaha Grandmotherly Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Melt the chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler over hot water until smooth. Cool slightly.
3. Beat the eggs with sugar in a large bowl until light, then slowly beat in the melted chocolate mixture.
4. Stir in vanilla extract. Gradually sift flour into the batter, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in salt, sour cream, and chopped walnuts.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square cake pan.
7. Bake until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean but slightly cakey, about 25 to 30 minutes.
8. Cool completely on a wire rack before cutting into bars.
MAKES: ABOUT 20 BROWNIES
